properties.body: (Kallesignal «Andøya Space»). Epost: mso@andoyaspace.no  Se www.andoyaspace.no for daglige varslinger og kart. Name: DANGER AREA GOLF2 Description: In the period 18 May - 24 May 2026 there will be activity off the coast of Andøya. Activities will take place during the period between 22:00-05:00 local time. The danger area "GOLF1 og GOLF2" is colored yellow prior to activation. 2-3 hours before the danger area is activated, it will be colored red. The danger area is disabled and returns to yellow as soon as the activity ends.   Should there be a need for transit or use of the area, this can be coordinated with Andøya Space.? During the above period, maritime traffic is asked to be aware of the notified areas or contact Andøya Space for coordination during the campaign period. Phone 94 07 59 44 / 76 14 45 87 and maritime VHF channel 16/14 (Call sign «Andøya Space»).   Email: mso@andoyaspace.no See www.andoyaspace.no for daily notifications and maps.
properties.name: Andoya Danger Area
